_comment: This file is OVERWRITTEN each security review. Do NOT append to it.

ssh_attacks.change_since_last: +1806 attempts since last review (2026-03-28T12:21), rate ~150/hr (down from ~258/hr)

cgi_security.execute_cgi: Hardened - exact whitelist match only (== on line 140), rate limited, dangerous pattern blocking
cgi_security.terminal_cgi: Safe - case statement with hardcoded commands, argument sanitization
cgi_security.action_cgi: Safe - delegates to queue script with rate limiting
cgi_security.prompt_version_cgi: Safe - agent whitelist and hex-only hash validation
cgi_security.git_file_diff_py: Safe - path sanitization (blocks .. and /), subprocess with list args (no shell injection)
cgi_security.git_file_history_py: Safe - path sanitization (blocks .. and /), subprocess with list args (no shell injection)

known_issues: World-writable API files (action-queue.json, action-status.json, postmortems.json) - required for CGI, mitigated by whitelist validation
Git history contains pattern matches for secret-like keywords - audit confirms these are search patterns in scripts, not actual credentials
notes: Full security review completed - all 19 checks passed, no new vulnerabilities
All 6 CGI scripts verified secure: exact whitelist matching confirmed in execute.cgi (line 140), case statements in terminal.cgi
All nginx protections verified: sensitive file types return 404, path traversal returns 400
TASK-279 merge verified: log-analysis-hub.html archived (404), security-center.html live (200), no eval() usage
TASK-280 merge verified: interaction-hub.html archived (404), communications-hub.html live (200), no eval() usage
innerHTML usage in merged pages reviewed: all template literals with API data, no direct user input injection vectors
SSH key permissions correct (600), SSH dir correct (700), CLAUDE.md (664)
Total failed SSH attempts: ~89,306 (up from 87,500 = +1,806 in ~12 hours, rate ~150/hr - decreasing from ~258/hr)
Top attacker: 165.154.6.42 with 2,417 attempts (persistent across reviews)
Unique attacker IPs: 910 in current log (up from 874, +36 new IPs)
SSH attack rate trending downward but volume still high - fail2ban remains top recommendation
recommendations: CRITICAL: Install fail2ban for SSH protection - 89k+ total attacks from 910+ unique IPs
Enable UFW firewall to restrict unnecessary ports
Consider rate limiting on web endpoints
